parameters.query: SELECT target_marketplace, target_category_id, target_category_name, confidence, usage_count, confirmed_by FROM mappings.categories WHERE source_marketplace = $1 AND source_category_id = $2 AND is_orphaned = false AND target_marketplace IN ('trendyol_ro', 'temu_ro') ORDER BY target_marketplace, CASE WHEN confidence = 'manual' THEN 0 WHEN confidence = 'auto' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, COALESCE(usage_count, 0) DESC;
